framework.name: Executive Sponsorship ROI Differential
framework.description: Manufacturing organizations with comprehensive C-level sponsorship see 84% ROI realization versus 75% without executive alignment, showing 9 percentage point improvement and suggesting governance solutions have quantifiable value.
framework.raw_quote: manufacturers with comprehensive C-level sponsorship are significantly more likely to see ROI (84%) compared to those without executive alignment (75%)

source.title: AI Software Development: Why 95% Of Enterprise Pilots Fail - USM
